name: Cheese-Puff Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 1 Baked potato (scrubbed, pierced with a fork and baked 3/4 - 1 hour at 450°F)
recipeInstructions:
From "Baby's First Helpings" by Chris Casson Madden ISBN: 0-385-19143-X
When cooking baked potatoes for yourself, include an extra one to make this dish for baby. If the baby has egg allergies, omit the eggs and double the milk amount.
1. Scoop out the potato and mash it in a bowl.
2. In a separate bowl, whip the egg and add it to the potato mixture.
3. Beat in butter, milk, cheese, and wheat germ until well combined.
4. Carefully spoon the filling back into the potato shell and fold a small piece of foil around the bottom to prevent leakage.
5. Place the potato in a preheated oven set to 350°F for 15 minutes.
6. To make ahead, cover the potatoes and refrigerate without baking. When ready to serve, place the potatoes uncovered in a 350°F oven for an additional 20 minutes.
For older babies
Serves 2-4
